title: Release v0.5.11

sources.reason: Canonical public release metadata to advance from v0.5.10 to v0.5.11.
Contains release metadata, Git isolation, AI_BASE_COMMIT isolation, and install-smoke evidence fixes absent from v0.5.10.
Defines consistency requirements for public release references.

riskAssessment.reason: A new immutable public tag changes every installation entrypoint and must remain internally consistent.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly approved publishing v0.5.11 and the required release references are discoverable.

preReviewWarnings: check-release-distribution can pass only after the immutable v0.5.11 tag is visible on the public remote.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: All public installer, documentation, and example references use v0.5.11.
Documentation metadata, installer tests, and full project quality pass.
The repository diff and governance evidence are ready for a release branch commit and pull request.
Post-publication verification requires an immutable v0.5.11 tag followed by check-release-distribution.
guidelines: Treat release.json as the canonical public release version.
Keep installer defaults, documentation, examples, and direct tests synchronized.
Do not move or overwrite an existing public tag.
Do not include unrelated .kiro files in release commits.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
